title: Check if the Array is Sorted II

content.problemStatement:
Given an array of size** n**, write a program to check if the given
    array is sorted in **(ascending / Increasing / Non-decreasing)** order or not. If the array is sorted
    then return True, Else return False.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, denoting the size of the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers, denoting the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: True if the array is sorted in ascending order, False otherwise.

solution.approach: Iterate through the array and check if each element is less than or equal to the next one.
